growth_records.cite: Inomura et al. A quantitative analysis of the direct and indirect costs of nitrogen fixation: a model based on Azotobacter vinelandii. The ISME Journal (2017). DOI:10.1038/ismej.2016.97. [PMC5315487]
growth_records.snippet: at typical saturated oxygen concentrations of 225 uM O2 ..., this organism should not require respiratory protection for growth rates above ~0.10 per day. Its maximum growth rate is ~0.75 day (Fogg, 1944).
growth_records.notes: Cited/modeled maximum growth rate, not measured here. mu_max = 0.75 per day; mu_per_h = 0.75/24 = 0.03125 /h; doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.75 day = 0.924 day = 22.2 h. O2 (saturation) = 225 uM stated. No medium composition, no numeric uptake/secretion flux in text.
